blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Add API validation for seat holding functionality
Verify that seats are held for 10 minutes during the checkout process.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to confirm the requirement of holding seats during the payment process, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality. While the linked use case describes the intended behavior, there is no evidence that confirms the actual implementation of this feature, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage. Specifically, the evidence does not show that seats are held for 10 minutes during checkout, nor does it provide any details on how this is managed in the system.
gaps: No evidence confirming the functionality of holding seats for 10 minutes during payment.
